'''Nawnam''' was a Hutt crimelord and a rival of [[Ganis]] the Hutt. 

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Nawnam attempted to eradicate [[Ganis]] in order to take over his empire. Ganis, in return, placed a bounty on his head. Nawnam's henchman, [[F'ej D'aw]], hired a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] to smuggle Nawnam off-planet. The Hutt was wounded in the attack and lost his [[Hoversled/Legends|repulsor-sled]] leaving him immobile. He hid in an old warehouse and waited for D'aw to find him a way off of the planet. The spacers stole a [[Speeder truck/Legends|repulsor-truck]] belonging to [[Burtiin]] to move the Hutt crimelord. Escaping the planet, Nawnam made his way to [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]].<ref name="heavylifting" />
